justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly identified 'next Thursday' as May 28th and searched for availability around 9 AM, offering suitable alternatives when the exact time was unavailable.
justifications.negotiation_effectiveness: The agent effectively offered two close alternative slots when the user's preferred 9 AM time was not available, leading to a quick resolution.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent efficiently processed all information in the first turn and booked the appointment in the second, without any unnecessary questions or turns.
justifications.customer_experience: The interaction was smooth and professional, with the agent quickly understanding the request and providing clear options, resulting in a positive customer experience.
